title: clarkia amoena var. pacifica
intro: Clarkia amoena var. pacifica, also known as the Pacific Clarkia or Farewell to Spring, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Clarkia amoena var. pacifica include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparation of the plant typically involves drying the flowers and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as a poultice or salve.
